snippets.description:
CreateCluster creates a new cluster in a given private cloud.
Creating a new cluster provides additional nodes for
use in the parent private cloud and requires sufficient [node
quota](https: //cloud.google.com/vmware-engine/quotas).
snippets.title: vmwareengine CreateCluster Sample

snippets.description: CreateExternalAccessRule creates a new external access rule in a given network policy.
snippets.title: vmwareengine CreateExternalAccessRule Sample

snippets.description:
CreateExternalAddress creates a new `ExternalAddress` resource in a given private cloud. The
network policy that corresponds to the private cloud must have the external
IP address network service enabled (`NetworkPolicy.external_ip`).
snippets.title: vmwareengine CreateExternalAddress Sample

snippets.description: CreateHcxActivationKey creates a new HCX activation key in a given private cloud.
snippets.title: vmwareengine CreateHcxActivationKey Sample

snippets.description: CreateLoggingServer create a new logging server for a given private cloud.
snippets.title: vmwareengine CreateLoggingServer Sample

snippets.description:
CreateManagementDnsZoneBinding creates a new `ManagementDnsZoneBinding` resource in a private cloud.
This RPC creates the DNS binding and the resource that represents the
DNS binding of the consumer VPC network to the management DNS zone. A
management DNS zone is the Cloud DNS cross-project binding zone that
VMware Engine creates for each private cloud. It contains FQDNs and
corresponding IP addresses for the private cloud's ESXi hosts and
management VM appliances like vCenter and NSX Manager.
snippets.title: vmwareengine CreateManagementDnsZoneBinding Sample

snippets.description:
CreateNetworkPeering creates a new network peering between the peer network and VMware Engine
network provided in a `NetworkPeering` resource. NetworkPeering is a
global resource and location can only be global.
snippets.title: vmwareengine CreateNetworkPeering Sample

snippets.description:
CreateNetworkPolicy creates a new network policy in a given VMware Engine network of a
project and location (region). A new network policy cannot be created if
another network policy already exists in the same scope.
snippets.title: vmwareengine CreateNetworkPolicy Sample

snippets.description:
CreatePrivateCloud creates a new `PrivateCloud` resource in a given project and location.
Private clouds of type `STANDARD` and
`TIME_LIMITED` are zonal resources, `STRETCHED` private clouds are
regional.
Creating a private cloud also creates a [management
cluster](https: //cloud.google.com/vmware-engine/docs/concepts-vmware-components)
for that private cloud.
snippets.title: vmwareengine CreatePrivateCloud Sample

snippets.description:
CreatePrivateConnection creates a new private connection that can be used for accessing private
Clouds.
snippets.title: vmwareengine CreatePrivateConnection Sample

snippets.description: CreateVmwareEngineNetwork creates a new VMware Engine network that can be used by a private cloud.
snippets.title: vmwareengine CreateVmwareEngineNetwork Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteCluster deletes a `Cluster` resource. To avoid unintended data loss, migrate or
gracefully shut down any workloads running on the cluster before deletion.
You cannot delete the management cluster of a private cloud using this
method.
snippets.title: vmwareengine DeleteCluster Sample

snippets.description: DeleteExternalAccessRule deletes a single external access rule.
snippets.title: vmwareengine DeleteExternalAccessRule Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteExternalAddress deletes a single external IP address. When you delete an external IP
address, connectivity between the external IP address and the corresponding
internal IP address is lost.
snippets.title: vmwareengine DeleteExternalAddress Sample

snippets.description: DeleteLoggingServer deletes a single logging server.
snippets.title: vmwareengine DeleteLoggingServer Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteManagementDnsZoneBinding deletes a `ManagementDnsZoneBinding` resource. When a management DNS zone
binding is deleted, the corresponding consumer VPC network is no longer
bound to the management DNS zone.
snippets.title: vmwareengine DeleteManagementDnsZoneBinding Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteNetworkPeering deletes a `NetworkPeering` resource. When a network peering is deleted for
a VMware Engine network, the peer network becomes inaccessible to that
VMware Engine network. NetworkPeering is a global resource and location can
only be global.
snippets.title: vmwareengine DeleteNetworkPeering Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteNetworkPolicy deletes a `NetworkPolicy` resource. A network policy cannot be deleted
when `NetworkService.state` is set to `RECONCILING` for either its external
IP or internet access service.
snippets.title: vmwareengine DeleteNetworkPolicy Sample

snippets.description: DeleteOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: vmwareengine DeleteOperation Sample

snippets.description:
DeletePrivateCloud schedules a `PrivateCloud` resource for deletion.

A `PrivateCloud` resource scheduled for deletion has `PrivateCloud.state`
set to `DELETED` and `expireTime` set to the time when deletion is final
and can no longer be reversed. The delete operation is marked as done
as soon as the `PrivateCloud` is successfully scheduled for deletion
(this also applies when `delayHours` is set to zero), and the operation is
not kept in pending state until `PrivateCloud` is purged.
`PrivateCloud` can be restored using `UndeletePrivateCloud` method before
the `expireTime` elapses. When `expireTime` is reached, deletion is final
and all private cloud resources are irreversibly removed and billing stops.
During the final removal process, `PrivateCloud.state` is set to `PURGING`.
`PrivateCloud` can be polled using standard `GET` method for the whole
period of deletion and purging. It will not be returned only
when it is completely purged.
snippets.title: vmwareengine DeletePrivateCloud Sample

snippets.description:
DeletePrivateConnection deletes a `PrivateConnection` resource. When a private connection is
deleted for a VMware Engine network, the connected network becomes
inaccessible to that VMware Engine network.
snippets.title: vmwareengine DeletePrivateConnection Sample

snippets.description:
DeleteVmwareEngineNetwork deletes a `VmwareEngineNetwork` resource. You can only delete a VMware
Engine network after all resources that refer to it are deleted. For
example, a private cloud, a network peering, and a network policy can all
refer to the same VMware Engine network.
snippets.title: vmwareengine DeleteVmwareEngineNetwork Sample

snippets.description:
FetchNetworkPolicyExternalAddresses lists external IP addresses assigned to VMware workload VMs within the
scope of the given network policy.
snippets.title: vmwareengine FetchNetworkPolicyExternalAddresses Sample

snippets.description: GetCluster retrieves a `Cluster` resource by its resource name.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetCluster Sample

snippets.description:
GetDnsBindPermission gets all the principals having bind permission on the intranet VPC
associated with the consumer project granted by the Grant API.
DnsBindPermission is a global resource and location can only be global.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetDnsBindPermission Sample

snippets.description: GetDnsForwarding gets details of the `DnsForwarding` config.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetDnsForwarding Sample

snippets.description: GetExternalAccessRule gets details of a single external access rule.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetExternalAccessRule Sample

snippets.description: GetExternalAddress gets details of a single external IP address.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetExternalAddress Sample

snippets.description: GetHcxActivationKey retrieves a `HcxActivationKey` resource by its resource name.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetHcxActivationKey Sample

snippets.description:
GetIamPolicy gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy
if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description: GetLocation gets information about a location.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetLocation Sample

snippets.description: GetLoggingServer gets details of a logging server.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetLoggingServer Sample

snippets.description: GetManagementDnsZoneBinding retrieves a 'ManagementDnsZoneBinding' resource by its resource name.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetManagementDnsZoneBinding Sample

snippets.description:
GetNetworkPeering retrieves a `NetworkPeering` resource by its resource name. The resource
contains details of the network peering, such as peered
networks, import and export custom route configurations, and peering state.
NetworkPeering is a global resource and location can only be global.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetNetworkPeering Sample

snippets.description: GetNetworkPolicy retrieves a `NetworkPolicy` resource by its resource name.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetNetworkPolicy Sample

snippets.description: GetNode gets details of a single node.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetNode Sample

snippets.description: GetNodeType gets details of a single `NodeType`.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetNodeType Sample

snippets.description: GetOperation is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetOperation Sample

snippets.description: GetPrivateCloud retrieves a `PrivateCloud` resource by its resource name.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetPrivateCloud Sample

snippets.description:
GetPrivateConnection retrieves a `PrivateConnection` resource by its resource name. The resource
contains details of the private connection, such as connected
network, routing mode and state.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetPrivateConnection Sample

snippets.description: GetSubnet gets details of a single subnet.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetSubnet Sample

snippets.description:
GetVmwareEngineNetwork retrieves a `VmwareEngineNetwork` resource by its resource name. The
resource contains details of the VMware Engine network, such as its VMware
Engine network type, peered networks in a service project, and state
(for example, `CREATING`, `ACTIVE`, `DELETING`).
snippets.title: vmwareengine GetVmwareEngineNetwork Sample

snippets.description:
GrantDnsBindPermission grants the bind permission to the customer provided principal(user /
service account) to bind their DNS zone with the intranet VPC associated
with the project. DnsBindPermission is a global resource and location can
only be global.
snippets.title: vmwareengine GrantDnsBindPermission Sample

snippets.description: ListClusters lists `Cluster` resources in a given private cloud.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListClusters Sample

snippets.description: ListExternalAccessRules lists `ExternalAccessRule` resources in the specified network policy.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListExternalAccessRules Sample

snippets.description:
ListExternalAddresses lists external IP addresses assigned to VMware workload VMs in a given
private cloud.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListExternalAddresses Sample

snippets.description: ListHcxActivationKeys lists `HcxActivationKey` resources in a given private cloud.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListHcxActivationKeys Sample

snippets.description: ListLocations lists information about the supported locations for this service.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListLocations Sample

snippets.description:
ListLoggingServers lists logging servers configured for a given private
cloud.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListLoggingServers Sample

snippets.description: ListManagementDnsZoneBindings lists Consumer VPCs bound to Management DNS Zone of a given private cloud.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListManagementDnsZoneBindings Sample

snippets.description:
ListNetworkPeerings lists `NetworkPeering` resources in a given project. NetworkPeering is a
global resource and location can only be global.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListNetworkPeerings Sample

snippets.description: ListNetworkPolicies lists `NetworkPolicy` resources in a specified project and location.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListNetworkPolicies Sample

snippets.description: ListNodeTypes lists node types
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListNodeTypes Sample

snippets.description: ListNodes lists nodes in a given cluster.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListNodes Sample

snippets.description: ListOperations is a utility method from google.longrunning.Operations.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListOperations Sample

snippets.description:
ListPeeringRoutes lists the network peering routes exchanged over a peering connection.
NetworkPeering is a global resource and location can only be global.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListPeeringRoutes Sample

snippets.description: ListPrivateClouds lists `PrivateCloud` resources in a given project and location.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListPrivateClouds Sample

snippets.description: ListPrivateConnectionPeeringRoutes lists the private connection routes exchanged over a peering connection.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListPrivateConnectionPeeringRoutes Sample

snippets.description: ListPrivateConnections lists `PrivateConnection` resources in a given project and location.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListPrivateConnections Sample

snippets.description: ListSubnets lists subnets in a given private cloud.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListSubnets Sample

snippets.description: ListVmwareEngineNetworks lists `VmwareEngineNetwork` resources in a given project and location.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ListVmwareEngineNetworks Sample

snippets.description:
RepairManagementDnsZoneBinding retries to create a `ManagementDnsZoneBinding` resource that is
in failed state.
snippets.title: vmwareengine RepairManagementDnsZoneBinding Sample

snippets.description: ResetNsxCredentials resets credentials of the NSX appliance.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ResetNsxCredentials Sample

snippets.description: ResetVcenterCredentials resets credentials of the Vcenter appliance.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ResetVcenterCredentials Sample

snippets.description:
RevokeDnsBindPermission revokes the bind permission from the customer provided principal(user /
service account) on the intranet VPC associated with the consumer project.
DnsBindPermission is a global resource and location can only be global.
snippets.title: vmwareengine RevokeDnsBindPermission Sample

snippets.description:
SetIamPolicy sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces
any existing policy.

Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED`
errors.
snippets.title: vmwareengine SetIamPolicy Sample

snippets.description: ShowNsxCredentials gets details of credentials for NSX appliance.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ShowNsxCredentials Sample

snippets.description: ShowVcenterCredentials gets details of credentials for Vcenter appliance.
snippets.title: vmwareengine ShowVcenterCredentials Sample

snippets.description:
TestIamPermissions returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the
resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of
permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error.

Note: This operation is designed to be used for building
permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization
checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.
snippets.title: vmwareengine TestIamPermissions Sample

snippets.description:
UndeletePrivateCloud restores a private cloud that was previously scheduled for deletion by
`DeletePrivateCloud`. A `PrivateCloud` resource scheduled for deletion has
`PrivateCloud.state` set to `DELETED` and `PrivateCloud.expireTime` set to
the time when deletion can no longer be reversed.
snippets.title: vmwareengine UndeletePrivateCloud Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateCluster modifies a `Cluster` resource. Only fields specified in `updateMask` are
applied.

During operation processing, the resource is temporarily in the `ACTIVE`
state before the operation fully completes. For that period of time, you
can't update the resource. Use the operation status to determine when the
processing fully completes.
snippets.title: vmwareengine UpdateCluster Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateDnsForwarding updates the parameters of the `DnsForwarding` config, like associated
domains. Only fields specified in `update_mask` are applied.
snippets.title: vmwareengine UpdateDnsForwarding Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateExternalAccessRule updates the parameters of a single external access rule.
Only fields specified in `update_mask` are applied.
snippets.title: vmwareengine UpdateExternalAccessRule Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateExternalAddress updates the parameters of a single external IP address.
Only fields specified in `update_mask` are applied.

During operation processing, the resource is temporarily in the `ACTIVE`
state before the operation fully completes. For that period of time, you
can't update the resource. Use the operation status to determine when the
processing fully completes.
snippets.title: vmwareengine UpdateExternalAddress Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateLoggingServer updates the parameters of a single logging server.
Only fields specified in `update_mask` are applied.
snippets.title: vmwareengine UpdateLoggingServer Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateManagementDnsZoneBinding updates a `ManagementDnsZoneBinding` resource.
Only fields specified in `update_mask` are applied.
snippets.title: vmwareengine UpdateManagementDnsZoneBinding Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateNetworkPeering modifies a `NetworkPeering` resource. Only the `description` field can be
updated. Only fields specified in `updateMask` are applied. NetworkPeering
is a global resource and location can only be global.
snippets.title: vmwareengine UpdateNetworkPeering Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateNetworkPolicy modifies a `NetworkPolicy` resource. Only the following fields can be
updated: `internet_access`, `external_ip`, `edge_services_cidr`.
Only fields specified in `updateMask` are applied. When updating a network
policy, the external IP network service can only be disabled if there are
no external IP addresses present in the scope of the policy. Also, a
`NetworkService` cannot be updated when `NetworkService.state` is set
to `RECONCILING`.

During operation processing, the resource is temporarily in the `ACTIVE`
state before the operation fully completes. For that period of time, you
can't update the resource. Use the operation status to determine when the
processing fully completes.
snippets.title: vmwareengine UpdateNetworkPolicy Sample

snippets.description:
UpdatePrivateCloud modifies a `PrivateCloud` resource. Only the following fields can be
updated: `description`.
Only fields specified in `updateMask` are applied.

During operation processing, the resource is temporarily in the `ACTIVE`
state before the operation fully completes. For that period of time, you
can't update the resource. Use the operation status to determine when the
processing fully completes.
snippets.title: vmwareengine UpdatePrivateCloud Sample

snippets.description:
UpdatePrivateConnection modifies a `PrivateConnection` resource. Only `description` and
`routing_mode` fields can be updated. Only fields specified in `updateMask`
are applied.
snippets.title: vmwareengine UpdatePrivateConnection Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateSubnet updates the parameters of a single subnet. Only fields specified in
`update_mask` are applied.

*Note*: This API is synchronous and always returns a successful
`google.longrunning.Operation` (LRO). The returned LRO will only have
`done` and `response` fields.
snippets.title: vmwareengine UpdateSubnet Sample

snippets.description:
UpdateVmwareEngineNetwork modifies a VMware Engine network resource. Only the following fields can be
updated: `description`. Only fields specified in `updateMask` are
applied.
snippets.title: vmwareengine UpdateVmwareEngineNetwork Sample
